top_choice.rationale: This is a release-driven post announcing an open-source model and pointing readers to a link, with value claims but no in-thread adoption walkthrough. That matches a resource/value showcase better than a playbook or migration path.
triggered_routing_signals: Open-source model publication with clear entry link
Value framing focuses on why it matters, not how to implement
No quickstart, boundary guidance, or old-vs-new migration steps
supporting_source_quotes: announcing Canopy Height Maps v2 (CHMv2), an open source model
deliver substantial improvements in accuracy, detail, and global consistency.
ambiguity_notes: Linked article may contain deeper technical guidance not present in the thread excerpt.

alternative_choices.rationale: There is a specific capability mention (DINOv3 Sat-L), but the post itself does not provide practical usage guidance, boundaries, or configuration detail expected for a playbook.

final_decision.rationale: This is a release-driven post announcing an open-source model and pointing readers to a link, with value claims but no in-thread adoption walkthrough. That matches a resource/value showcase better than a playbook or migration path.
